framework.name: Cryptographic Mechanisms and Agility Recommendations
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Recommended cryptographic algorithms, key sizes, and agility practices for information protection
framework.structure_description: Recommendations for symmetric encryption, asymmetric encryption, hash functions, digital signatures, key management, and cryptographic agility planning.

controls.title: Approved symmetric algorithms
controls.description: Use AES-256 or AES-128 in authenticated mode (GCM, CCM). Avoid DES, 3DES, RC4, and Blowfish.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser AES-256 ou AES-128 en mode authentifie (GCM, CCM). Eviter DES, 3DES, RC4 et Blowfish.

controls.title: Approved asymmetric algorithms
controls.description: Use RSA 2048+ (4096 recommended), ECDSA/ECDH with P-256 or P-384, or Ed25519/X25519.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser RSA 2048+ (4096 recommande), ECDSA/ECDH avec P-256 ou P-384, ou Ed25519/X25519.

controls.title: Approved hash functions
controls.description: Use SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512. Avoid MD5 and SHA-1 for any security-critical purpose.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser SHA-256, SHA-384 ou SHA-512. Eviter MD5 et SHA-1 pour tout usage critique en securite.

controls.title: Key size requirements
controls.description: Minimum key sizes: AES-128 (symmetric), RSA-2048 (asymmetric), ECDSA P-256 (elliptic curve). Use larger keys for protection beyond 2030.
controls.description_nl: Tailles de cle minimales : AES-128 (symetrique), RSA-2048 (asymetrique), ECDSA P-256 (courbe elliptique). Utiliser des cles plus grandes pour une protection au-dela de 2030.

controls.title: Random number generation
controls.description: Use cryptographically secure random number generators (CSPRNG) certified or evaluated for all key generation.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des generateurs de nombres aleatoires cryptographiquement surs (CSPRNG) certifies ou evalues pour toute generation de cle.

controls.title: Key lifecycle management
controls.title_nl: Gestion du cycle de vie des cles
controls.description: Implement formal key lifecycle management: generation, distribution, storage, rotation, revocation, and destruction.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre une gestion formelle du cycle de vie des cles : generation, distribution, stockage, rotation, revocation et destruction.

controls.title: Key storage protection
controls.description: Store cryptographic keys in hardware security modules (HSM) or secure enclaves. Never store keys in plaintext files.
controls.description_nl: Stocker les cles cryptographiques dans des modules de securite materielle (HSM) ou des enclaves securisees. Ne jamais stocker les cles dans des fichiers en clair.

controls.title: Cryptographic agility plan
controls.description: Maintain a cryptographic agility plan enabling rapid algorithm replacement if an algorithm is compromised or deprecated.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir un plan d'agilite cryptographique permettant le remplacement rapide d'algorithme si un algorithme est compromis ou deprecie.

controls.title: Post-quantum readiness
controls.description: Begin planning for post-quantum cryptography migration. Inventory systems using vulnerable algorithms (RSA, ECDSA) and evaluate hybrid approaches.
controls.description_nl: Commencer a planifier la migration vers la cryptographie post-quantique. Inventorier les systemes utilisant des algorithmes vulnerables (RSA, ECDSA) et evaluer les approches hybrides.

controls.title: Cryptographic inventory
controls.description: Maintain an inventory of all cryptographic implementations, algorithms, and key sizes used across the organization.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir un inventaire de toutes les implementations cryptographiques, algorithmes et tailles de cle utilises dans l'organisation.
